name: snarl-sopi-backend
description: Snarl & Sopi operator backend — v5.06: deal product targeting upgraded from free text to a catalog typeahead. New GET /api/v1/products/search (name/barcode, ≥3 chars) returns thumbnail, current resale price, and live stock count (summed from slot_stock, scoped to the deal's selected machines when set). Composer shows a predictive dropdown + selected-product chips. Builds on v5.05 deals engine.
